title: Fig 1 in Trichilia (Meliaceae) plants: an important source of biomolecules with insecticidal properties
author: García-Gómez, A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig 1. Extraction procedure. Each Trichilia spp. bark was extracted sequentially using organic solvents (hexane, ethyl acetate, acetone, methanol, and water) with increasing polarity.
